backlog.title: Scaffold Android project (Gradle, Hilt, Manifest)
backlog.notes: Create the full android/ project structure: settings.gradle.kts, app/build.gradle.kts, AndroidManifest.xml, HubitatApp @HiltAndroidApp, MainActivity. All deps pinned, ./gradlew assembleDebug must succeed.

backlog.title: Implement Kotlin data models
backlog.notes: Create all 9 data class files in data/model/: DeviceState, SSEEvent, TileType (15 values), TileConfig, GroupConfig, ConnectionType, HsmMode, HubMode, HubVariable.

backlog.title: Implement ConnectionResolver and SettingsRepository
backlog.notes: ConnectionResolver resolves base URL for LOCAL/CLOUD/AUTO modes. SettingsRepository wraps EncryptedSharedPreferences. NetworkModule provides OkHttpClient via Hilt.

backlog.title: Implement HubitatApiService and SseClient
backlog.notes: Retrofit interface with all 10 Maker API endpoints. OkHttp SseClient with exponential backoff reconnect. ApiModule via Hilt.

backlog.title: Implement DeviceRepository and PinRepository
backlog.notes: DeviceRepository merges REST + SSE into StateFlow. PinRepository uses jBCrypt for local PIN hash. RepositoryModule via Hilt.

backlog.title: Implement SettingsScreen and SettingsViewModel
backlog.notes: Material 3 Settings form with all hub config fields, connection mode picker, PIN setup. Onboarding redirect. Test Connection button.

backlog.title: Implement app shell, navigation, and DeviceViewModel
backlog.notes: MainScreen with ModalNavigationDrawer, Scaffold, NavHost. GroupBottomNav + GroupDrawer + HubitatTopBar. DeviceViewModel wraps repository StateFlows.

backlog.title: Implement SystemStatusRow
backlog.notes: Horizontal chip row: HSM, Mode, Connection, 6 connector chips. Color-coded states. Scrollable LazyRow.

backlog.title: Implement GroupScreen and groups.kt config
backlog.notes: Port all 14 groups from groups.ts to Kotlin. GroupScreen LazyVerticalGrid 2-column TileCards. Pull-to-refresh.

backlog.title: Implement SwitchTile, ConnectorTile, and DimmerTile
backlog.notes: SwitchTile toggles on/off. ConnectorTile with colored dot. DimmerTile with level slider.

backlog.title: Implement RGBWTile with colour picker
backlog.notes: Color swatch, on/off toggle, brightness slider, HSB color picker. Sends setColor in Hubitat map format.

backlog.title: Implement sensor tiles (contact, motion, temp, power, presence, battery, ring-detection)
backlog.notes: 7 read-only tile composables with correct icons, colors, and numeric readouts.

backlog.title: Implement control tiles (button, lock, hub-variable, hsm, mode) and PinDialog
backlog.notes: PinDialog with invalid PIN error. ButtonTile push. LockTile PIN-protected. HubVariableTile editable. HsmTile and ModeTile with mode pickers + PIN.

backlog.title: Implement polish (theme, group reorder, error banner, icon, APK docs)
backlog.notes: Dynamic theme with DataStore override. Group drag-reorder. No-connection banner at 30s. Custom adaptive icon. android/README.md with sideload instructions.

backlog.title: Write QA test plan and functional validation checklist
backlog.notes: Create android/QA_TEST_PLAN.md with 9 test sections covering all 15 tile types, dual-connection modes, PIN flows, SSE, theme, and group reordering.
